custom.title: Custom Tools
custom.description: Manage custom shell-based tools for agents
custom.emptyDescription: Create your first custom tool to get started.

delete.title: Delete Custom Tool
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name *
form.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
form.commandHint: Shell template. Use {{.key}} for parameter placeholders.

errors.nameSlug: Name must be a valid slug (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)

builtin.title: Built-in Tools
builtin.description: Manage system built-in tools. Enable/disable or configure settings globally.
builtin.emptyDescription: No built-in tools have been seeded yet.

settingsDialog.title: Settings — {{name}}
settingsDialog.noFields: No configurable settings for this tool.

jsonDialog.title: Settings: {{name}}
jsonDialog.description: Edit tool-specific settings as JSON. Changes take effect immediately after saving.

kgSettings.title: Knowledge Graph Settings
kgSettings.description: Configure entity extraction from memory writes. Requires a provider/model capable of structured JSON output.
kgSettings.providerTip: LLM provider used to extract entities and relations from text.
kgSettings.modelTip: Model ID for extraction. Should support structured JSON output.
kgSettings.minConfidenceHint: Entities below this confidence score are discarded (0.0–1.0).
kgSettings.autoExtractHint: Automatically extract entities when agents write to memory files.

mediaChain.description: Configure and order provider fallbacks. Drag to reorder — the first enabled provider is tried first.
mediaChain.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one below.
